allow: Bash(opencode --model opencode/big-pickle --prompt 'You are a code reviewer. Do the following in order: *)
Bash(opencode run --model opencode/big-pickle 'You are a code reviewer. Do the following in order: *)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d[0]; print\('title:', t['title'], '| previewUrl:', \(t.get\('previewUrl'\) or 'null'\)[:50]\)")
